features: Reliable and antibacterial protection against body odour
With the tried and tested Motionsense technology
The more you move, the more it protects
48 hour protection against body odour and underarm wetness
description: Product Description A long-lasting fresh feeling and 48 hours protection against body odour: this is the Rexona deodorant spray Active Shield anti-perspirant. It keeps fresh all day long and reliably prevents unpleasant odours. In addition to reliable protection, the Rexona Pure deodorant spray offers motion activated protection. Directions Apply before physical activity
